header.title: Password Strength Checker — Analyze Password Security Online
header.description: Free online password strength checker with real-time entropy calculation, pattern detection, crack-time estimates, and actionable security suggestions. Test and analyze your password security instantly — 100% client-side, nothing leaves your browser.
header.keywords: password strength checker, password strength test, check password strength, password security checker, password analyzer, password entropy calculator, crack time estimate, secure password check

privacy.notice: 100% client-side. Your password never leaves this browser tab — analysis is performed locally in JavaScript.

input.label: Enter Password
input.placeholder: Type or paste your password here…

strength.excellentDesc: This password is highly resistant to attacks.

crackTimes.title: Estimated Crack Time
crackTimes.desc: Time to crack assuming attacker has the hash and tries at the listed rate:
crackTimes.note: Assumes brute-force attack on full charset. Dictionary attacks may be faster for common words.

suggestions.title: Suggestions to Improve
suggestions.avoidCommon: Avoid common words or predictable patterns
suggestions.passphraseTip: Consider using a passphrase for easier memorability

bestPractices.title: Security Tips
bestPractices.passphraseTip: A passphrase (4+ random words) can be stronger AND easier to remember
bestPractices.tip1: Use a password manager — you only need to remember one master password
bestPractices.tip2: Enable 2FA wherever possible — it protects even weak passwords
bestPractices.tip3: Never reuse passwords across different services
bestPractices.tip4: Change passwords after any data breach notification

emptyState.title: Type a password above to analyze its strength
emptyState.desc: Analysis happens instantly, locally, and privately

suggestionsList.noCommon: Avoid common words or predictable patterns
suggestionsList.passphrase: Consider using a passphrase for easier memorability

howToUse.title: How to Use
howToUse.step1Desc: Type or paste any password in the input field. Analysis starts immediately.
howToUse.step2Desc: Check the overall rating from Very Weak to Very Strong, plus entropy bits and crack times.
howToUse.step3Desc: See which character-type requirements are met and which are missing. View detected patterns.
howToUse.step4Desc: Follow the suggestions panel — add length, mix character types, or use a passphrase.

items.question: How is password entropy calculated?
items.answer: Entropy = length × log₂(charset size). For example, a 12‑char password with mixed case, digits, and symbols yields about 72 bits of entropy.

items.question: What do the crack times mean?
items.answer: They estimate how long an attacker with the hash would take via brute force. Offline GPU attacks can try 100+ billion guesses per second.

items.question: What makes a password strong?
items.answer: Length matters most (12+ characters). Combine uppercase, lowercase, digits, and symbols. Avoid dictionary words, keyboard patterns, and repeats.

items.question: Does this tool store or send my password?
items.answer: No. Everything runs locally in JavaScript — your password never leaves this browser tab.

items.question: What does "entropy" measure?
items.answer: Entropy measures unpredictability in bits. A password with 50 bits of entropy is 2⁵⁰ times harder to guess than one with 30 bits.

items.question: How do I interpret the crack time estimates?
items.answer: Crack times assume the attacker has the password hash. Online attacks are slower due to server throttling; offline GPU attacks can try billions of guesses per second.
